auth.name: Full name
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link to activate your account.
auth.devEmailNote: Dev mode: the link is printed in the server console.
auth.verifyFailed: This link is invalid or has expired.
auth.forgotSent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.resetDone: Your password has been updated. You can now log in.

account.title: My account
account.requestPending: Your membership request is pending review.
account.memberInfo: You are a full member. Thank you!

testimonial.title: My testimonial
testimonial.description: Share what your experience with the club has meant to you. A club curator may feature your testimonial publicly on the home page. Editing a featured testimonial sends it back for re-approval before it appears again.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: The members area: club roster and member tools.

messages.title: Announcements
messages.error: Could not post the announcement. Please try again.

participation.title: Participation
participation.subtitle: Roles, speeches, evaluations and awards across the club.
participation.cardHint: See who's done what — per-person history and club totals.
participation.notFound: This member could not be found.

executive.title: Executive
executive.subtitle: The executive team workspace. You see only the tools your role allows.

tools.meetings: Add meetings, generate the year, manage holidays.
tools.notifications: Email members and manage scheduled sends.
tools.executives: Assign executive positions and view history.
tools.permissions: Delegate calendar and content permissions to members
tools.settings: Configure club settings, email and QR.
tools.uploads: Upload images to object storage for News and content.
tools.news: Write, edit and publish bilingual news articles.
tools.testimonials: Curate member testimonials and feature them on the home page.

news.title: News
news.intro: Write, edit and publish club news. Both languages are required before an article can be published.
news.none: No articles yet. Create your first one.
news.publishBlocked: Both English and French title and content are required before publishing.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Curate member testimonials. Feature one or both languages to publish them on the home page, and reorder the featured ones.

admin.settingsIntro: Only admins can change these values. They drive the public site, emails and PDFs.

emailTest.hint: Save your changes first, then send a test to your own address to confirm delivery actually works.
emailTest.ok: Test email sent to {email}. Delivery is working.
emailTest.misconfigured: Not sent: both the API key and the sender address are required. Fill in the missing field and save.
emailTest.stub: No Resend key is configured, so nothing was sent (the link is logged to the server console in dev).
emailTest.failed: Resend rejected the message: {error}. A common cause is a sender on a domain that isn't verified in Resend.

h.frequency_weeks: Weeks between meetings, used to generate the meeting year (1 = weekly).
h.number_start: Meetings are numbered contiguously from this value in date order.
h.default_min_minutes: Seeds the timing window of new speeches; the standard is 5.
h.default_max_minutes: Seeds the timing window of new speeches; the standard is 7. Must be ≥ the minimum.
h.agenda_buffer_minutes: Added to each speech's maximum when allotting agenda time, covering transitions and applause.
h.target_url: Where the guest check-in QR code points. Leave blank to use this site's built-in /checkin page.
h.api_key: Secret key from your Resend dashboard. Required to send membership, reset, and notification emails.
h.from_address: The verified Resend sender address emails are sent from (e.g. "Club Name <noreply{'@'}yourdomain.org>"). Required together with the API key — if either is blank, no email is sent.

roles.title: Meeting roles
roles.intro: The roles members sign up for at each meeting. Rename, reorder, or deactivate them — they are used everywhere a meeting role appears.
roles.officer: Meeting officer (introduced at the start of the meeting)
roles.inUse: This role is in use. Deactivate it instead of deleting.

agenda.title: Agenda template
agenda.intro: The ordered, timed agenda used to generate each meeting's agenda. Bind an item to a role to auto-fill it with that role's signed-up person.
agenda.speechesNote: Expands per speech (title & presenter) when generated
agenda.evaluationsNote: Expands per speech (each evaluator) when generated

meetings.title: Meetings & calendar
meetings.intro: Schedule meetings and mark holidays / no-meeting dates. New meetings use the default agenda template.
meetings.holidaysIntro: Dates with no meeting (holidays, breaks). Shown on the public calendar.
meetings.generateIntro: Create all recurring meetings at once. Dates with a holiday or an existing meeting are skipped.

executives.title: Executive team
executives.intro: Assign members to executive positions. Capability flags decide who can manage the calendar, content, or assign officers — no role names are hard-coded.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.intro: Delegate the calendar-manage and content-edit capabilities to specific members. Grants take effect immediately and are kept as history when revoked — no role names are hard-coded.
permissions.note: These grants are separate from executive positions: an officer may already hold a capability through their position. Admins always hold every capability.

notifications.title: Email notifications
notifications.intro: Send members the list of open meeting roles — now, or on a recurring schedule. Set the Resend key and sender address in Settings before sending for real.
notifications.notConfigured: No email provider is configured yet — sends will be logged to the server console as a preview. Add a Resend API key and sender address in Settings to deliver real email.
notifications.sendConfirm: Send this email to all members now?
notifications.schedulesIntro: Recurring sends. The dispatcher runs every 15 minutes and fires any active schedule that is due.

uploads.title: Image uploads
uploads.intro: Upload an image to object storage and get a persistent URL. Used by News and content blocks.
uploads.notConfigured: Image storage isn't configured on this deployment (set the S3_* environment variables).

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Updates and stories from our club.
news.empty: No news has been published yet.

pages.empty: This page hasn’t been published yet.
pages.publishBlocked: Both English and French title and content are required before publishing.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Have a question or want to visit a meeting? Send us a message and we’ll get back to you.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Thanks for reaching out — your message has been sent. We’ll be in touch soon.
contact.error: Your message could not be sent. Please try again later.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.subtitle: When we meet, our themes, and who is doing what.
meetings.noMeetingBody: There is no meeting scheduled for this date.
meetings.loginToSignUp: Log in as a member to sign up for a role.
meetings.markYourselfPresentHint: Let the club know you're here.
meetings.recordAttendanceHint: Mark each member present. Checked-in members are pre-filled — just adjust the exceptions.
meetings.recordAttendanceAnytime: You can record presence anytime, even after the meeting.
meetings.addGuestHint: Add a guest who is here:
meetings.projectQr: Show this QR or link so guests can check themselves in.
meetings.checkInIntro: Welcome! Add your name so we can say hello.
meetings.noUpcomingMeeting: There's no upcoming meeting to check in to right now.
meetings.speaker: Speaker
meetings.signupMatrixHint: The next meetings at a glance — tap a cell to sign up, assign, or release.
meetings.swipeHint: Swipe sideways to see more dates.
meetings.minutesNotSubmittedHint: These minutes haven't been entered yet.
meetings.minutesReadOnly: You can read these minutes but not edit them.
meetings.quorumNoData: Not enough past attendance to calculate a quorum threshold.

voting.title: Voting
voting.voterHint: When a category is open, tap a candidate to cast your vote. You can vote once per category.
voting.resultsForbidden: Only the meeting's Toastmaster and officers can view the results.
voting.resultsWhenClosed: Results will appear once the Sergeant-at-Arms closes this ballot.
voting.resultsNotRun: No voting was held for this category.
voting.notOpened: Voting has not been opened for this category yet.
voting.notOpenYet: Voting hasn't opened yet — these are the nominees.
voting.prepareHint: Review the nominees and strike out anyone over time, then open the ballot.
voting.prepareHintTT: Add the Table Topics participants, then open both ballots.
voting.closedNoResults: Voting is closed. Results were announced at the meeting.
